title: Brands | Xponential
meta_description: Xponential Fitness is the largest fitness franchise group of boutique fitness brands across verticals, including Pilates, Barre, Stretching, Boxing, and more.
body_markdown:
This website uses tracking technologies (collectively, “cookies”) to share your personal information with our affiliates, partners, and service providers to personalize your experience on our Online Services, including analyzing and tracking your activities on our websites, and to tailor advertising to your interests. Choosing to reject some or all cookies may impact your experience. Please see our [Privacy Policy](https://www.xponential.com/privacy-policy "Privacy Policy") for more information.

# Our Brands
##### Health & Wellness
[ Inquire to Franchise > ](https://www.xponential.com/franchising)
#### Leading brands across verticals in health and wellness
![Woman doing Pilates](https://www.xponential.com/hubfs/cli-assets/images/franchising/xponential-brands/clubpilates.jpg) ![open modal](https://www.xponential.com/hubfs/cli-assets/images/utility/plus-circle.svg)
![Club Pilates Logo](https://www.xponential.com/hubfs/cli-assets/images/franchising/xponential-brands/logos/clubpilates.svg)
Close ![close modal button](https://www.xponential.com/hubfs/cli-assets/images/utility/close-modal.svg)
![Club Pilates Logo](https://www.xponential.com/hubfs/cli-assets/images/main-page/brands-logo/clubpilates.svg)
Club Pilates
Club Pilates is the largest Pilates brand globally, offering low-impact, full-body Reformer-based workouts designed with the vision of making Pilates more accessible, approachable, and welcoming to everyone. Based in Irvine, CA, Club Pilates has appeared in both Entrepreneur Magazine's Franchise 500, Fastest-Growing Franchises five years running, and Inc. Magazine's Inc. 5000 lists multiple times. 
[ Learn More > ](https://clubpilates.com/)
![Man doing Yoga](https://www.xponential.com/hubfs/cli-assets/images/franchising/xponential-brands/yogasix.jpg) ![open modal](https://www.xponential.com/hubfs/cli-assets/images/utility/plus-circle.svg)
![YogaSix Logo](https://www.xponential.com/hubfs/cli-assets/images/franchising/xponential-brands/logos/yogasix.svg)
Close ![close modal button](https://www.xponential.com/hubfs/cli-assets/images/utility/close-modal.svg)
![YogaSix Logo](https://www.xponential.com/hubfs/cli-assets/images/main-page/brands-logo/yogasix.svg)
YogaSix
YogaSix is the largest franchised yoga brand that offers a broad range of heated and non-heated yoga classes, boot camp-style fitness classes, and meditation accessible to all. Classes at YogaSix eliminate the intimidation factor that many people feel when trying yoga for the first time, offering a fresh perspective on one of the world's oldest fitness practices. 
[ Learn More > ](https://www.yogasix.com/)
![Woman doing a deadlift](https://www.xponential.com/hubfs/cli-assets/images/franchising/xponential-brands/bft.jpg) ![open modal](https://www.xponential.com/hubfs/cli-assets/images/utility/plus-circle.svg)
![BFT Logo](https://www.xponential.com/hubfs/cli-assets/images/franchising/xponential-brands/logos/bft.svg)
Close ![close modal button](https://www.xponential.com/hubfs/cli-assets/images/utility/close-modal.svg)
![BFT Logo](https://www.xponential.com/hubfs/cli-assets/images/main-page/brands-logo/bft.svg)
BFT
Founded in 2017 in Melbourne, Australia by fitness industry veteran Cameron Falloon, BFT offers a community-based 50-minute functional training and strength-based program across 14 workouts. BFT uses science and technology-based training techniques to drive individual member health goals in an inclusive, coach-led group environment.
[ Learn More > ](https://bodyfittraining.com/)
![Woman doing Barre](https://www.xponential.com/hubfs/cli-assets/images/franchising/xponential-brands/purebarre.jpg) ![open modal](https://www.xponential.com/hubfs/cli-assets/images/utility/plus-circle.svg)
![Pure Barre Logo](https://www.xponential.com/hubfs/cli-assets/images/franchising/xponential-brands/logos/purebarre.svg)
Close ![close modal button](https://www.xponential.com/hubfs/cli-assets/images/utility/close-modal.svg)
![Pure Barre Logo](https://www.xponential.com/hubfs/cli-assets/images/main-page/brands-logo/purebarre.svg)
Pure Barre
Pure Barre is the largest barre brand, offering a range of effective, low-impact, high-intensity full-body barre workouts for a broad range of fitness levels. Pure Barre has four signature class formats including introductory, classic barre, interval training, and resistance training. 
[ Learn More > ](https://www.purebarre.com/)
![Woman stretching](https://www.xponential.com/hubfs/cli-assets/images/franchising/xponential-brands/stretchlab.jpg) ![open modal](https://www.xponential.com/hubfs/cli-assets/images/utility/plus-circle.svg)
![StretchLab Logo](https://www.xponential.com/hubfs/cli-assets/images/franchising/xponential-brands/logos/stretchlab.svg)
Close ![close modal button](https://www.xponential.com/hubfs/cli-assets/images/utility/close-modal.svg)
![StretchLab Logo](https://www.xponential.com/hubfs/cli-assets/images/main-page/brands-logo/stretchlab.svg)
StretchLab
StretchLab is the largest assisted stretching brand globally that was created to help people through customized flexibility services. Led by highly trained Flexologists™, StretchLab offers one-on-one and group-assisted stretching sessions to customers across a broad range of age and fitness levels in a welcoming, fun, and community-focused environment.
[ Learn More > ](https://www.stretchlab.com/)
